title: Billing Pipeline Deployment 2026-04-03
content:
Deployment 2026.04.03.2 updated the billing_daily transform to enforce discount_code normalization before loading billing_fact.
The deployment also changed the customer_dim staging model to expect discount_code as a nullable string field.
Rollback guidance: restore the previous customer_dim contract mapping and rerun the billing_daily DAG.
Known risk: upstream producers not sending discount_code can cause contract validation failures.
